hooks.command: input=$(cat); title=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.title // "Claude Code") + ": " + (.message // "Needs attention")' | head -c 200); if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then pre='\033Ptmux;\033' suf='\033\\'; else pre='' suf=''; fi; printf "${pre}\033]9;%s\a${suf}" "$title" > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; printf "${pre}\033]1337;RequestAttention=once\a${suf}" > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; printf '\a' > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; echo "$title" >> /tmp/claude-notifications.log; true
